title: rubus derasiformis
intro: Rubus derasiformis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, commonly known as the Himalayan raspberry. It is a shrub-like plant with edible fruits that have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus derasiformis include its potential to aid in digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
